class.name: ARGeoTrackingConfiguration
class.brief_description: Configuration for GPS-anchored geo tracking AR sessions.
class.description: Configures a session for geo tracking, which combines visual localization with GPS to place content at real-world geographic coordinates. Use with [method ARSession.run_geo_tracking]. Call [method check_availability] to verify the current location supports geo tracking before starting. [b]iOS 14+ only.[/b] On visionOS and macOS, [method is_supported] returns false.

method.name: check_availability
method.description: Checks whether geo tracking is currently available at the user's location. The callback receives a boolean result and an optional error message.

method.name: is_supported
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] when the current device supports geo tracking.

method.name: set_detection_image_group
method.description: Loads a reference image group from the asset catalog and assigns it to [member detection_image_group_name]. Returns [code]true[/code] on success.

members.member: The asset-catalog image group used for reference-image detection during geo tracking.
Controls how environment probes are generated during geo tracking.
When enabled, ARKit produces [ARLightEstimate] data for geo-tracking frames.
Bitmask of [enum ARWorldTrackingConfiguration.PlaneDetection] values to detect while geo tracking.
Requests HDR environment textures when environment texturing is enabled.
